---
title: "SuppFig5B_Fig5D_FeaturePlots"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-15"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
```

```{r}
lungQuery <-readRDS("C:/Users/Sshaikh9/Downloads/lungQuery_After_Az_Normalized.rds")
```
```{r diagnostics}
# Check working directory
message("Working directory: ", getwd())

# Check if lungQuery exists
message("lungQuery exists: ", exists("lungQuery"))

# If it exists, check it is a Seurat object
if (exists("lungQuery")) {
  message("Class: ", class(lungQuery))
  message("Cells: ", ncol(lungQuery))
} else {
  message("lungQuery NOT FOUND — check your loading chunk")
}
```


```{r}
features_all <- c("TGFBR2", 
"IGF1R",
"EGFR",
"PDGFRA",
"IL6ST",
"IGFBP5",
"CDKN1B",
"MYCBP2",
"BMPR2",
"JAK1",
"ZEB2",
"ZEB1",
"KMT2A",
"DNMT3A",
"DNMT1",
"FOXO1",
"RUNX1",
"CDKN1A",
"MALAT1",
"NEAT1")
```

features_all <- c("AOPEP","CD44","SPRR1A","KRT78","CST1","HOXC11")
custom <- subset(lungQuery, subset = Donor_Group %in% groups)

lungQuery <- 

```{r}
getwd()
```


feat <- 'NEAT1'
```{r featureplots, echo=TRUE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
dir.create("Plots6", showWarnings = FALSE)

features_all <- c("SFTPC", "LAMP3", "IGF1R", "TGFBR2", "EGFR",
                  "BMPR2", "ZEB1", "JAK1", "ZEB2", "KMT2A",
                  "MYCBP2", "DNMT3A")

for (feat in features_all){

  p <- FeaturePlot(
    object = lungQuery,
    features = feat,
    split.by = "Donor_Group",
    raster = FALSE,
    cols = c("#89cff0", "grey", "red")
  ) +
    patchwork::plot_layout(ncol = 2, nrow = 4) &
    ggplot2::theme(legend.position = "right")

  print(p)

  ggsave(
    filename = paste0("Plots6/FeaturePlot_", feat, "_All.png"),
    plot = p,
    width = 10,
    height = 12,
    dpi = 300
  )
}
```
